narrative:
Ottawa-Glandorf Local Sd (Putnam) school district has 6,329 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.3 percentage points.
